laln lnL; (yksd LkHkk)] v'kksd gksVy] pk.kD;iqjh] ubZ fnYyh& 110021(orZeku irk) lh&2 ,Lisu gkbZV~~l] nklkiYYkk fgYl] fo'kk[kkiÙkue&530 030 (LFkk;h irk) 40 Jh Jhfuokl dslhusuh] laln lnL; (yksd lHkk) v'kksd gksVy] pk.kD;iqjh] ubZ fnYyh& 110021(orZeku irk) dslhusuh Hkou] fiUukykojh LVªhV] iqjkus cl LVSaM ds lkeus] fot;okM+k] vka/z çns'k&520 002 (LFkk;h irk) &lnL;¸ ¹iQk- la- 11&34@2013 bZbZ&10º ts- vkye] la;qDr lfpo fVIIk.k%—ewy vf/lwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti=k esa dk- vk- 1109(v) rkjh[k 1 ebZ] 2013 n~~okjk izdkf'kr dh xbZ Fkh vkSj rRi'pkr~~ dk- vk- 328(v)] rkjh[k 4 iQjojh] 2014 n~~okjk la'kksf/r dh x;h Fkh -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT (Department of School Education and Literacy) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th January, 2015 S.O. 163(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (4) of section 3 of the National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993 (73 of 1993), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the Notification of the Government of India vide S.O. 1109(E), dated the 1st May, 2013, in the Ministry of Human Resource Development (Department of School Education and Literacy) as follows, namely:— In the said notification, under the heading clause (o) of sub-section (4) of section 3, for serial numbers 39 and 40 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely :— “39. Dr. Hari Babu Kambhampati, -Member Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), Ashok Hotel, Chankyapuri, New Delhi-110021 (Present address) C-2, Aspen Heights, Dasapalla Hills, Visakapatnam-530003 (Parmanent address) 40. Shri Srinivas Kesineni, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Ashok Hotel, Chankyapuri, New Delhi-110021 (Permanent address) Kesineni Bhavan, Pinnalavari Street, -Memebr”. Opp. Old Bus Stand, Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh-520002 (Permanent address) [F. No. 11-34/2013-EE-10] J. ALAM, Jt. Secy. Note:— The principal notification was published in the Official Gazette vide S. O. 1109(E) dtated 1st May, 2013 and subsequently amended vide S.O. 328(E), dated 4th February, 2014. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
